data.title: feat: create skogai-git orchestrator skill
data.description:
Parent epic: #7

## Summary

Create `skills/skogai-git/SKILL.md` that orchestrates gita, worktrunk, and gptodo into unified git workflows.

## Scope

* Routing table: intent → sub-skill (status → gita, worktree → worktrunk, tasks → gptodo)
* Composite workflows:
  * Morning check (fetch all, show dirty/behind)
  * Start task (pick issue → create worktree → assign)
  * Ship task (commit → push → PR → merge → clean up)
  * End of day (status across all worktrees + repos)
* @-references to sub-skills: `@skills/gita/SKILL.md`, `@skills/worktrunk/SKILL.md`, `@skills/gptodo/SKILL.md`
* Register in `CLAUDE.md` routing table

## Dependencies

* #8 (worktrunk skill)
* #9 (gptodo skill)
* gita skill already exists

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `skills/skogai-git/SKILL.md` created with routing and composite workflows
- [ ] Registered in [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) routing table
- [ ] All three sub-skills independently triggerable
